description:
You are a systems architect at ClearMed, a healthcare technology company. Create a 2-page system architecture document in EdrawMax.

Page 1 — "ClearMed System Architecture":
Create a system architecture diagram showing a load balancer at the top connecting to 3 web applications: Patient Portal (React / Nginx), Provider Dashboard (Angular / Nginx), and Admin Console (Vue.js / Nginx). All 3 applications connect down to a central API Gateway (Kong). The API Gateway connects to 4 backend microservices: Authentication Service (Node.js), EHR Records Service (Java / Spring Boot), Billing Service (Python / Django), and Analytics Service (Go). Show two databases at the bottom: PostgreSQL (connected to EHR Records and Billing services) and MongoDB (connected to Authentication and Analytics services). Include an external integration "HL7 FHIR Gateway" as a cloud shape connected to EHR Records Service. Label every component with its name and technology stack.

Page 2 — "Patient Admission Workflow":
Create a cross-functional swimlane flowchart for patient admission with 3 lanes: Front Desk, Clinical Staff, and Billing Department. Start with "Patient Arrives" and end with "Admission Complete." Include at least 12 process steps and 3 decision diamonds: "Insurance Verified?", "Pre-authorization Required?", and "Room Available?". Show the flow through registration, triage, insurance verification, clinical assessment, room assignment, and billing setup.

Save as /home/ga/Documents/clearmed_architecture.eddx and export Page 1 as PNG to /home/ga/Documents/clearmed_architecture.png.
